title: cyclophyllum rectinervium
intro: Cyclophyllum rectinervium, a species of plant native to the tropical regions of New Caledonia, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, Cyclophyllum rectinervium has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of fever and skin conditions. Cyclophyllum rectinervium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to leverage its medicinal properties.
